title: Count dunning notices — operationId vs DB-noun trap (collections skill)
prompt: Using the collections-and-dunning skill, answer: how many dunning notices currently exist in total? Use the direct CLI alias `zeyos count dunning`. Note: the dunning-notices resource has no `visibility` field, so do not filter on it. Output just the number on the RESULT line, e.g. `RESULT: 9`.
